name: Zayo
notes:
APAC Max prefix-limit:
 IPv4: 500
 IPv6: 50


**Notes:**   
LyonIX is backhauled to Marseille, France  
SwissIX is backhauled to Frankfurt, Germany  
NIX.CZ/SK is connected to Vienna, Austria  

**Contacting Zayo's IP NCC:**  
Peers:  when contacting our IP NCC *please* include your:
* ASN
* local & remote BGP session IPs
* location of the link where you're experiencing trouble, including the facility name 
* circuit ID, if you have one (legacy AboveNet PNIs might not)

customer-facing BGP communities:  https://shorturl.at/beoA5
(not settable by peers)

Please request escalation from  enterprise.ncc.network@zayo.com if you don't get a ticket number from ipncc@zayo.com within two business days.
